mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.route_id, r.detail_id, r.branch_no, r.arrive_time, r.pass_place_id, p.name_zh AS pass_place_nm FROM yy_route_detail_places r LEFT JOIN yy_place p ON r.pass_place_id = p.id WHERE r.route_id = #{routeId}

SELECT rdp.arrive_time as time, rdp.pass_place_id as placeId, p.name_zh as info, p.name_zh as placeNm, p.summary_zh as placeInfo, p.place_img_url as placeImg FROM yy_route_detail_places rdp LEFT JOIN yy_place p ON rdp.pass_place_id = p.id WHERE rdp.route_id = #{routeId} AND rdp.detail_id = #{detailId} ORDER BY rdp.branch_no;
